'''chajowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uke|uke]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-j-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uke|uke]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chajowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæjeweth|chæjeweth]] || [[word:chæjewej|chæjewej]] || [[word:chæjewesh|chæjewesh]] || [[word:chæjewe|chæjewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chajojowoth|chajojowoth]] || [[word:chajojowoj|chajojowoj]] || [[word:chajojowosh|chajojowosh]] || [[word:chajojowo|chajojowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chajowoth|chajowoth]] || [[word:chajowoj|chajowoj]] || [[word:chajowosh|chajowosh]] || [[word:chajowo|chajowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chajofwoth|chajofwoth]] || [[word:chajofwoj|chajofwoj]] || [[word:chajofwosh|chajofwosh]] || [[word:chajofwof|chajofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chajowotho|chajowotho]] || [[word:chajowojo|chajowojo]] || [[word:chajowosho|chajowosho]] || [[word:chajowoko|chajowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chajowoth|chajowoth]] || [[word:chajowoj|chajowoj]] || [[word:chajowosh|chajowosh]] || [[word:chajowo|chajowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chajowothol|chajowothol]] || [[word:chajowojol|chajowojol]] || [[word:chajowoshol|chajowoshol]] || [[word:chajowokol|chajowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chajowothotho|chajowothotho]] || [[word:chajowojojo|chajowojojo]] || [[word:chajowoshosho|chajowoshosho]] || [[word:chajowoko|chajowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chajowothon|chajowothon]] || [[word:chajowojon|chajowojon]] || [[word:chajowoshon|chajowoshon]] || [[word:chajowokon|chajowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chajowothoro|chajowothoro]] || [[word:chajowojoro|chajowojoro]] || [[word:chajowoshoro|chajowoshoro]] || [[word:chajowokoro|chajowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
